2603.26211.title: Towards GUI Agents: Vision-Language Diffusion Models for GUI Grounding
2603.26211.paper_summary: Autoregressive (AR) vision-language models (VLMs) have long dominated multimodal understanding, reasoning, and graphical user interface (GUI) grounding. Recently, discrete diffusion vision-language models (DVLMs) have shown strong performance in multimodal reasoning, offering bidirectional attention, parallel token generation, and iterative refinement. However, their potential for GUI grounding remains unexplored. In this work, we evaluate whether discrete DVLMs can serve as a viable alternative to AR models for GUI grounding. We adapt LLaDA-V for single-turn action and bounding-box prediction, framing the task as text generation from multimodal input. To better capture the hierarchical structure of bounding-box geometry, we propose a hybrid masking schedule that combines linear and deterministic masking, improving grounding accuracy by up to 6.1 points in Step Success Rate (SSR) over the GUI-adapted LLaDA-V trained with linear masking. Evaluations on four datasets spanning web, desktop, and mobile interfaces show that the adapted diffusion model with hybrid masking consistently outperforms the linear-masked variant and performs competitively with autoregressive counterparts despite limited pretraining. Systematic ablations reveal that increasing diffusion steps, generation length, and block length improves accuracy but also increases latency, with accuracy plateauing beyond a certain number of diffusion steps. Expanding the training data with diverse GUI domains further reduces latency by about 1.3 seconds and improves grounding accuracy by an average of 20 points across benchmarks. These results demonstrate that discrete DVLMs are a promising modeling framework for GUI grounding and represent an important step toward diffusion-based GUI agents.
2603.26211.paper_summary_zh: 自回歸（AR）視覺-語言模型（VLMs）長期以來主導著多模態理解、推理和圖形用戶界面（GUI）基礎。最近，離散擴散視覺-語言模型（DVLMs）在多模態推理中表現出色，提供了雙向注意力、並行標記生成和迭代精煉。然而，它們在GUI基礎方面的潛力仍然未被探索。在本研究中，我們評估離散DVLMs是否可以作為AR模型在GUI基礎方面的可行替代方案。我們將LLaDA-V調整為單輪動作和邊界框預測，將任務框架設定為從多模態輸入生成文本。為了更好地捕捉邊界框幾何的層次結構，我們提出了一種混合遮罩計劃，結合了線性和確定性遮罩，將GUI適應的LLaDA-V在使用線性遮罩訓練時的步驟成功率（SSR）提高了最多6.1個點。對於涵蓋網頁、桌面和移動界面的四個數據集的評估顯示，使用混合遮罩的調整後擴散模型始終優於線性遮罩變體，並且儘管預訓練有限，仍與自回歸對應模型競爭。系統的消融實驗顯示，增加擴散步驟、生成長度和區塊長度可以提高準確性，但也會增加延遲，準確性在超過某個擴散步驟數量後會達到平臺。擴展訓練數據以涵蓋多樣的GUI領域進一步將延遲減少約1.3秒，並在各基準上平均提高20個點的基礎準確性。這些結果表明，離散DVLMs是一個有前景的GUI基礎建模框架，並代表了朝向基於擴散的GUI代理的重要一步。
2603.26211.author: Shrinidhi Kumbhar et.al.
2603.26211.authors: Shrinidhi Kumbhar, Haofu Liao, Srikar Appalaraju, Kunwar Yashraj Singh
